_comment: KfW BEG (Bundesförderung für effiziente Gebäude) program overview. Source: kfw.de. Hardcoded — update quarterly.
_note: No KfW API exists. These values are manually maintained. Check kfw.de/BEG for current rates.

beg_wg.name: BEG Wohngebäude (Neubau)
beg_wg.description: New construction loan. Subsidized interest rate for energy-efficient new builds.
beg_wg.note: Rate as of Dec 2025. Applies to KfW-Effizienzhaus 40/55/70.

beg_em_heizung.name: BEG Einzelmaßnahmen — Heizungsanlage
beg_em_heizung.description: Grant (Zuschuss) for replacing fossil fuel heating with renewable energy heating.
beg_em_heizung.note: Base 30% + Climate Speed Bonus 20% (replace before 2028) + Income Bonus 20% (household income <€40K). Cannot combine with investment property income generally — verify eligibility.

beg_em_other.name: BEG Einzelmaßnahmen — Sonstige (Dämmung, Fenster, etc.)
beg_em_other.note: 15% base for insulation, windows, etc. +5% bonus for iSFP (individueller Sanierungsfahrplan).

typical_heating_replacement_cost_eur.note: Rough ranges for German residential units 60-100m². Prices vary significantly. Verify with quotes.
